question: For each order, find the customer name and the dish name. Sort the result in descending order of the quantity of dish.
sql: SELECT c.Name, co.Dish_Name, co.Quantity FROM customer_order co JOIN customer c ON co.Customer_ID = c.Customer_ID ORDER BY co.Quantity DESC;

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求获取每个订单的客户名称和菜品名称，并按菜品数量降序排列。SQL描述中包含正确的表（customer_order, customer）、列（c.Name, co.Dish_Name, co.Quantity）和排序条件（co.Quantity DESC），且无额外过滤或聚合操作，完全匹配需求。
